Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Fixfest is a global gathering of repairers, tinkerers, and activists 133 upvotes, 15 comments
  2. Building a Procedural Hex Map with Wave Function Collapse 357 upvotes, 52 comments
  3. An opinionated take on how to do important research that matters 69 upvotes, 13 comments
  4. JSLinux Now Supports x86_64 219 upvotes, 57 comments
  5. Sir Tony Hoare has died 142 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. FontCrafter: Turn your handwriting into a real font 412 upvotes, 132 comments
  7. The first airplane fatality 42 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Workers report watching Ray-Ban Meta-shot footage of people using the bathroom 188 upvotes, 68 comments
  9. So you want to write an “app” (2025) 33 upvotes, 9 comments
  10. Oracle is building yesterday's data centers with tomorrow's debt 159 upvotes, 68 comments
  11. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 134 upvotes, 59 comments
  12. Notes on Baking at the South Pole 24 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 839 upvotes, 513 comments
  14. Rethinking Syntax: Binding by Adjacency 37 upvotes, 14 comments
  15. Show HN: The Mog Programming Language 108 upvotes, 55 comments
  16. Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later 125 upvotes, 67 comments
  17. The Cost of 'Lightweight' Frameworks: From Tauri to Native Rust 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX part 1: PSU and NVRAM (2020) 87 upvotes, 47 comments
  19. Velxio, Arduino Emulator 37 upvotes, 16 comments
  20. Durdraw – ANSI art editor for Unix-like systems 31 upvotes, 13 comments
  21. Show HN: Remotely use my guitar tuner 10 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. Launch HN: Terminal Use (YC W26) – Vercel for filesystem-based agents 76 upvotes, 53 comments
  23. Bluesky CEO Jay Graber is stepping down 265 upvotes, 237 comments
  24. Is legal the same as legitimate: AI reimplementation and the erosion of copyleft 299 upvotes, 323 comments
  25. DARPA’s new X-76 139 upvotes, 140 comments
  26. Rendezvous with Rama 78 upvotes, 80 comments
  27. Show HN: DenchClaw – Local CRM on Top of OpenClaw 75 upvotes, 80 comments
  28. Helios: Real real-time long video generation model 7 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. No leap second will be introduced at the end of June 2026 67 upvotes, 76 comments
  30. Florida judge rules red light camera tickets are unconstitutional 279 upvotes, 405 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 10 March 2026. Source here.
